title: eriogonum umbellatum var. glaberrimum
intro: Eriogonum umbellatum var. glaberrimum, also known as Utah sully or sulfur buckwheat, is a flowering plant that belongs to the buckwheat family, Eriogonaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum umbellatum var. glaberrimum include reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and promoting digestion. Eriogonum umbellatum var. glaberrimum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile medicinal plant.
